ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v61

10 days full of updates in a row😍

- Fixed the chats not loading (huge kudos to Zain for finding the flags, thanks a lot!🔥)

- Fixed the voice message background playback not working.
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
